---
title: "Preference Reversals"
listing:
  contents: "."
  type: grid
  sort: "title asc"
  categories: false
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    categories: "{preference-reversals}"
  fields: [title, description]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Preferences are considered rational if they remain consistent over time. In reality, however, we do change our minds, have problems committing to decisions and are biased towards present rewards.
